title: Verify existing notification system implementation
description: The task requires a complete notification system covering model, service, API routes, helpers, and tests. All components are already implemented and verified: src/models/notification.ts (NotificationSeverity + Notification interface), src/services/notifications.ts (NotificationService with notify/getUnread/markRead/markAllRead), API routes at src/app/api/notifications/ (GET list, POST mark-all-read, PATCH mark-single-read), src/routes/notifications.ts, src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts (formatNotification, filterNotifications, getUnreadCount, sortBySeverity), and src/services/notifications.test.ts + src/utils/notificationHelpers.test.ts with 18 passing tests. No further implementation needed.
existing_patterns: src/auth/withAuth.ts - route handler wrapper with JWT validation and user extraction
src/services/notifications.ts - Payload-based service class with constructor injection
src/models/notification.ts - TypeScript type exports for domain model
src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts - Pure function utility module with co-located tests
